title: atlas.knowledge.qa.v1 Input Schema
description: Input parameters for Atlas Enterprise Knowledge QA. Caller provides a question in natural language. The private knowledge base, retrieval strategy, embedding models, and domain-tuned ranking logic all run on the Responder side and are never exposed to the Caller.

question.description: The question to answer. Should be a natural language query. The Responder's retrieval pipeline handles all disambiguation and reformulation internally.

language.description: BCP-47 language tag for the desired response language. Defaults to the detected language of the question.

max_sources.description: Maximum number of source citations to include in the response. Does not affect retrieval depth, only the number of citations surfaced.

context_hint.description: Optional domain or topic hint to guide retrieval focus (e.g. 'HR policy', 'Q3 financial report'). Does not change which knowledge base is searched.
